hero.headline: Powering Dallas with Safe, Reliable Electrical Solutions
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to full rewiring, our team delivers expert craftsmanship and peace of mind.

featureSections.title: Your Home's Safety Is Our Priority
featureSections.body: Whether you need a simple outlet repair or a complete panel upgrade, our electricians treat your home with respect and precision. We use top-grade materials and follow all safety codes to ensure lasting results.
bullets: Licensed and insured for your protection
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: Modernize your electrical panel to handle today's power demands and reduce fire risk.

featureSections.title: Keep Your Business Running Smoothly
featureSections.body: Downtime costs money. Our commercial electricians provide fast, efficient service to minimize disruption. From wiring new construction to troubleshooting existing systems, we keep you powered.
bullets: After-hours service to avoid business interruption
featureSections.cardBody: 24/7 emergency response for critical electrical issues. Call (469) 619-1727 anytime.

servicesPage.intro: From small repairs to large installations, Buzz Electrics offers a full range of electrical services in Dallas. Our licensed electricians use the latest tools and techniques to ensure safety, efficiency, and durability.

services.title: Residential Wiring & Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Safe and code-compliant wiring for new construction, additions, and older homes.
services.longDescription: Whether you're building a new home or upgrading outdated wiring, our team ensures every connection meets the highest standards. We handle all types of residential wiring, including knob-and-tube replacement, aluminum wiring mitigation, and smart home integration.
benefits: Enhanced safety and reduced fire risk

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We assess your current system and discuss your needs.

process.title: Plan & Estimate
process.description: We provide a detailed plan and transparent quote.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our electricians complete the work cleanly and efficiently.

faqs.question: How do I know if my home needs rewiring?
faqs.answer: Signs include flickering lights, frequent breaker trips, and outlets that feel warm. If your home is over 40 years old, it's wise to have an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does a full rewiring take?
faqs.answer: It depends on the size of your home. Most projects take 3-5 days. We minimize disruption by working efficiently and cleaning up daily.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your breaker panel to handle modern power loads safely.
services.longDescription: Older panels may not support today's electrical demands, leading to tripped breakers and potential hazards. We install high-capacity panels from top manufacturers, ensuring your home or business has reliable power distribution.

process.title: Load Calculation
process.description: We calculate your current and future power needs.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We handle all permits and inspections required by Dallas code.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: We install the new panel and test every circuit for safety.

faqs.question: What size panel do I need?
faqs.answer: Most homes benefit from a 200-amp panel. We'll recommend the right size based on your usage and future plans.

faqs.question: Is an upgrade worth the investment?
faqs.answer: Yes – it increases safety, prevents damage to electronics, and can lower your insurance premiums.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Indoor and outdoor lighting solutions that enhance ambiance and security.
services.longDescription: From recessed lighting to landscape illumination, we design and install lighting that transforms your space. Our team works with you to choose fixtures and placement that match your style while maximizing efficiency with LED options.
benefits: Customized design for any room or outdoor area
Improved home security with motion-activated lights

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision and assess the space.

process.title: Design Proposal
process.description: We create a lighting plan with fixture recommendations.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install all wiring, fixtures, and controls professionally.

faqs.question: Can you install smart lighting systems?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We work with brands like Lutron, Philips Hue, and others to integrate smart controls.

faqs.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting for commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide commercial-grade outdoor lighting for parking lots, signage, and security.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: Fast, 24/7 response for urgent electrical issues.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies don't wait for business hours. Our team is on call 24/7 to handle power outages, sparking outlets, exposed wires, and other dangerous situations. We prioritize safety and restore your power quickly.
benefits: Fully stocked trucks for immediate repairs
Peace of mind knowing help is always available

process.title: Call Dispatch
process.description: Call (469) 619-1727 – we'll ask about the issue and send the nearest team.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: We diagnose the problem and explain the solution.

process.title: Repair & Safety Check
process.description: We fix the issue and test the system to ensure safety.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: Any situation that poses an immediate safety risk: exposed wires, smoke from outlets, power loss in critical areas, etc.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency calls?
faqs.answer: We have a standard emergency service fee, but we never upsell unnecessary repairs. Our rates are transparent.

about.headline: Bringing Power and Safety to Dallas Homes & Businesses
about.mission: Our mission is to provide exceptional electrical services that prioritize safety, reliability, and customer satisfaction. We believe in honest communication, fair pricing, and craftsmanship that lasts.
story: Buzz Electrics was founded by a team of master electricians who saw a need for trustworthy service in Dallas. Tired of fly-by-night operators and shoddy work, they set out to build a company that puts quality first. Starting with just a truck and a commitment to excellence, they grew through word-of-mouth and repeat business.

Today, Buzz Electrics serves hundreds of residential and commercial clients across the Dallas metro area. Our team continues to invest in training, tools, and technology to stay ahead of industry standards. We're proud to be a local business that treats every job like it's our own home.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: Every job follows strict safety protocols to protect you and our team.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay updated on the latest codes and technologies.

coreValues.title: Community Focus
coreValues.description: We're proud to support local Dallas organizations and events.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Buzz Electrics
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call us or fill out the form below for a free estimate.
